## Summary

Add dark mode support to the application UI to reduce eye strain for users working in low-light environments.

## Motivation

User feedback consistently requests dark mode. It is now a standard feature expectation for modern applications.

## Scope

- System-level dark mode detection
- Manual toggle in settings
- Persistent preference storage
